p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { (exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or not continuous_condition(x0, x1, x2, k0) } } or continuous_at(x0, x1)) = continuous_at_intro(x0, x1) }(f, x)
not (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } } and not continuous_at(f, x)) or not continuous_at_intro(f, x)
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } } or not continuous_at_intro(f, x) or continuous_at(f, x)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } } and not continuous_at(f, x) or continuous_at_intro(f, x))
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } } = true or continuous_at_intro(f, x))
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) }) or continuous_at_intro(f, x) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) }) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) } or not x0.is_positive })
(forall(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) } or not x0.is_positive or continuous_at_intro(f, x) })
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
not continuous(f) or forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous(f) or continuous_at(f, x0) })
not forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } or continuous(f)
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(f, k0) } or continuous(f)
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(f, k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { not continuous_at(f, w0) }
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) }(w0)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
(forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) }(x)

goal: continuous_at(f, x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } }

p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, x)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, eps) }

p.c: eps.is_positive
continuous_at(f, x)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, x0) } } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) }) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x1, x0) }) }(eps)
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x, x0, eps) } or not eps.is_positive
not eps.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, eps) }

goal: continuous_condition(f, g(x), eta, eps) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(g(x), eta) implies f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(g(x), eta, f, eps)

goal: continuous_condition(g, x, delta, eta) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta) implies g(x0).is_close(g(x), eta) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, g, eta)
continuous_condition(g, x, delta, eta)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or g(x0).is_close(g(x), eta) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eta)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not g(x0).is_close(g(x), eta)) }(y)
not y.is_close(x, delta) or g(y).is_close(g(x), eta)
continuous_condition(f, g(x), eta, eps)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(g(x), eta) or f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(g(x), eta) and not f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(g(x), eta) and not f(x0).is_close(f(g(x)), eps)) }(g(y))
not g(y).is_close(g(x), eta) or f(g(y)).is_close(f(g(x)), eps)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Real, Real, Real](f, g, y)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Real, Real, Real](f, g, x)

goal: compose(f, g, y).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), eps)
not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) or forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or compose(f, g, x0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not compose(f, g, x0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps)) or not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps) or not x0.is_close(x, delta) or compose(f, g, x0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or compose(f, g, x0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not compose(f, g, k0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not compose(f, g, k0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, delta) and not compose(f, g, w0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) }
w0.is_close(x, delta)
not compose(f, g, w0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or compose(f, g, x0).is_close(compose(f, g, x), eps) }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, g(x), k0, eps) }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(g, x, k0, eta) }
continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
delta.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, eps)) }(delta)

goal: eps2.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, eps2) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }(eps2)

goal: continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }

p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = continuous_at(x0, x1) }(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x)

goal: not forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }

p.c: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, k0) } }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) } }
w0.is_positive
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0)) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0) or not x0.is_positive })
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }(w0)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, w1, w0) }
w1.is_positive
continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, w1, w0)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, w0)) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, k0)) } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, bad_eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, x0) } }(bad_eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, k0, bad_eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, w0, bad_eps) }
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x, x0, bad_eps)) }(w0)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(g)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(g, x)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { not continuous(x0) or continuous_at(x0, x1) }(f, g(x))

goal: continuous(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g)) = forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x0) }

p.c: function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g))
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { not continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), w0) }
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, g), x0) }(w0)
